title: lappula squarrosa subsp. heteracantha
intro: Lappula squarrosa subsp. heteracantha, also known as the heteracanthous lappula, is a plant species within the family Boraginaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Lappula squarrosa subsp. heteracantha typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which are used to make teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
